titleStmt.title: SII 8.398: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 398. (A.R. No. 112 of 1903). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[śrīmatu]tribhu vaṉacakkra vat
tikaḷ koṉeriṉmaiko
ṇṭāṉ kiṭcempināṭṭu
t tiruppullāṇi Āḻvār
koyil nampiceyvāṉuk
kum śrīvaiṣṇa vaṟkum . Iv
vāḻvāṟku tevatāṉa I
ṟaiyiliyāka variyiliṭṭa
Ūrkaḷukku Aiñcāvatu
vaikācimāsam paṭiyeṭu
ttuk koṭuvantu kāṭṭiṉa
kalveṭṭuppaṭi Ittiru
ppullāṇi nāṉkel
laik kuṭpaṭṭa nilamum Em
palkaḷum paṉampaṟṟukka
ḷum cempiyaṉperāmpūru
m maṟuvāyāṉa śrīvalla
vanallūrum kaḷariyāṉa
kaiytavanallūril nilam A
raiye nālumāvum nallā
ṉkuṭiyum nallirukkaiyāna
virapāṇṭiyanallūrum ce
vvirukkaiṉāṭṭu śrīkaraṇama
ṅkalamum Iṭaikkuḷanāṭṭu
teṉkoṟṟaṉkuṭiyum I
vvūr pālapūtiyeriyum put
tempalum kaṇṇaneriyu
m Iluppaikkoṭem
palum tirunārāyaṇane
riyum Āyakkuṭiyāṉa kā
rāḷakaṟpakanallūrum ma
ttivayalum civantai
yum kaḷāttirukkaināṭ
ṭuc cellūrāṉa śrīvalla
vanallūrum tuvvūrkūṟṟa
ttu [sāḷagrā ma] ttilum Āśra
masi tticcaturvvedi maṅkala
ttilum varakuṇavaḷanā
ṭṭu Irāciṅkamaṅkalat
tilum tevatānamāṉa ni
lam maṭappuṟa miraṇṭugrā ma
mum Akkaḷaneṟiccatu
rvvedi maṅkalattu maṭappiṟa
māṉa kaḷḷakkuṭiyum kal
veṭ ṭuṭpaṭa tevatāṉam
Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṟuppatā
kavum teyvaccilaiyāṉ
Aḻakaṉāṉa Āriyaccakkaravat
tiyum parākra mapāṇṭiyan
Ammā ṉirāmaṉāṉa va k
kai Āriyaccakkaravattiyum
Ivarkaḷ muvarkaḷum tanta
piṭipāṭṭiṉpaṭiye teva
tāṉam Iṟaiyiliyāy van
ta kiṭcempināṭṭu Āṉaiku
ṭiyum kaṭampaṅkuṭiyum maturai
kuḷamum kompūtiyum
cevvirukkaināṭṭup putte
mpalilum matiraippuliyilu
m teṟṟaṅkālilum nilam On
patumā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyu
m kuṭitāṅki merutuṅkaṉāna kaṅ
kai nārāyaṇaccakkaravatti piṭipāṭ
ṭiṉpaṭi tevatāṉam Iṟaiyili
yāy vanta kaḷāttirukkaiṉāṭṭuk
karunāṭikaṉum tevatāṉam Iṟai
yiliyāy vanta Ivvūrkaḷum nila
ṅkaḷum Ivvāḻvāṟkut tirup
paṭimāṟ ṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum ni
mantaṅkaḷukku paṇṭāṭu paḻanaṭai
tevatāṉam Iṟaiyiliyāy I
ṟuppatāka nāmum tantom . Ippaṭi
cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka kallilu
ñ cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka . Itu
maturotaiyavaḷaṉāṭṭuk kāñaiiru
kkai Uḻakkuṭi muttaāṭkoṇṭavi
lliyāṉa miṉavatarayaṉ ṉeḻuttiṉāl
yaāṇṭu Aiñcāvatu nāḷ muṉṉūṟ ṟirupa
ttumuṉṟu . Ivai vaṭatalaic cempi
nāṭṭuk koṭumaḷūrāṉa Uttamapā
ṇṭiyanallūr Arayaṉ tirumuṭi cūṭi .
Digital edition of SII 8.398 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
